debug_info.goal:
r : ℝ
hr : Irrational r
n : ℕ
hd : 2 ≤ n
⊢ ∃ S,
    Equidecomp.IsDecompOn sorry
      (@sdiff (Set (Point n)) Set.instSDiff (Ball r n)
        (@singleton (Point n) (Set (Point n)) Set.instSingletonSet (origin n)))
      S

failed_attempts:
by
      -- S_move = A, S_stay = Source \ A
      let S_move := A
      let S_stay := ((Ball r n) \ {origin n}) \ A
      refine ⟨{S_move, S_stay}, ?_⟩
      intro S hS
      fin_cases hS
      · use .move
        intro x hx
        simp [S_move] at hx
        simp [hx]
      · use .stay
        intro x hx
        simp [S_stay] at hx
        simp [hx.2]
        rfl }
